subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to group licenses by publisher and compute total contract value, average cost per seat, and license count. Use GROUP BY on publisher with SUM(contract_value), AVG(cost_per_seat), and COUNT(*) aggregations.

plan.cost_rationale: Single straightforward SQL aggregation task with GROUP BY and standard aggregate functions (SUM, AVG, COUNT). No joins, CTEs, or window functions required. Small tier is appropriate for this simple single-table grouping and aggregation. One subtask is sufficient—all metrics are computed in a single SQL query with standard GROUP BY syntax.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(*) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
